content:
昨晚我联络了MegaCrit，很幸运得到了在《忘却前夜》中自由参考《杀戮尖塔》中角色和IP的许可！这虽然不是一次官方交错联动，而是我们单方面的制作内容致敬，但对于我们来说已经超级激动人心！脑缸组的许多设计师都是《杀戮尖塔》的忠实粉丝，我做的底层游戏设计也深受其启发，他们的许可让我们深受鼓舞！因此我希望将这个消息分享给所有守密人！我们也向所有还没有体验过这款游戏的守密人推荐《杀戮尖塔》！

预计我们会在游戏中加入致敬《杀戮尖塔》的无数值成长的长肉鸽模式，希望大家会喜欢！我们也欢迎任何大家的想法和建议！当然……这可能会需要很长一段时间！

Last night I reached out to MegaCrit, and we were lucky enough to receive permission to freely reference Slay the Spire’s characters and IP in Morimens！While this isn’t an official cross-collaboration—it’s our one‑sided homage content—it’s still incredibly exciting for us! Many designers in the Brain-in-a-Vat team are devoted Slay the Spire fans, and my foundational game design has been deeply inspired by it. Their permission is hugely encouraging! I wanted to share this news with all Keepers. And for any Keepers who haven’t played it yet, we highly recommend Slay the Spire!

We’re planning to add a no-stats-growth “meat roguelike” mode as an homage to Slay the Spire in our game. We hope you’ll like it! We also welcome any ideas and suggestions—though… it may take quite a while!
thread_title: 前瞻：致敬《杀戮尖塔》Preview: An Homage to “Slay the Spire”
